problem_text_cn: 1089 将两个半径$R=20\ \mathrm{cm}$的半球壳合成“马德堡球”，估算两侧各需施加多大的力方可将球拉成两半。（大气压强$p_0\approx1.0\times10^5\ \mathrm{Pa}$）
problem_text_en: 1089 Two hemispherical shells of radius $R=20\ \mathrm{cm}$ are combined to form a "Magdeburg sphere". Estimate the force required to pull the sphere into two halves on each side. (Atmospheric pressure $p_0\approx1.0\times10^5\ \mathrm{Pa}$)
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】大气对半球面的**合压力等效于对半球底面圆的压力**，由压力公式$F = pS$计算，其中$S = \pi R^2$为底面圆面积。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】The **resultant atmospheric pressure on the hemispherical surface is equivalent to the pressure on the bottom circle of the hemisphere**. Calculate using the pressure formula $F = pS$, where $S = \pi R^2$ is the area of the bottom circle.
problem_answer: 两侧各需施加的拉力约为$\boldsymbol{F \approx 1.0\times10^4\ \mathrm{N}}$
